g.title: Inode slot is free in the bitmap
Standard file or directory with one parent

ul.li: link_count is a uint16_t in the inode structure.
fs_rmdir logic: link_count 2 (parent + self .) becomes 0 in one atomic step after empty check.
Directory Protection: fs_link must return EPERM if target is a directory to prevent loops.
Exactly one directory entry maps to this inode_num
N directory entries map to this inode_num

div.p: Trigger: ln existing new Guard: !S_ISDIR(mode) Action:
Trigger: fs_link() Guard: link_count < 65535 Action: link_count++
Trigger: rm / unlink Guard: link_count > 2 Action:
Trigger: rm / unlink Guard: link_count == 2 Action:

g.title: Inode slot is free in the bitmap
Standard file or directory with one parent
